title: Work item execution report — retry pattern & pain-point visibility

steps.description: Database: add nullable fix_summary TEXT column to fix_cycles; FixCycle.fix_summary mapped field in orch/db/models.py; Alembic migration under orch/db/migrations/versions/
Code review: S01 (schema + migration correctness, naming, comments, nullable handling)

Backend: report assembly service orch/daemon/execution_report.py; markdown renderer; iw item-report CLI in orch/cli/item_commands.py; daemon completion hook in orch/daemon/batch_manager.py; fix-cycle summary ingestion in orch/daemon/fix_cycle.py; edit fix prompt templates to require fix_summary in result contract
Code review: S03 (service layering, CLI pattern, hook placement, template contract changes, fix-summary ingestion defensiveness)

API: new tab route GET /project/{pid}/item/{iid}/tab/execution-report and standalone page route GET /project/{pid}/item/{iid}/execution-report in dashboard/routers/items.py; both call the report assembly service and render the fragment template
Code review: S05 (route conventions, session handling, 404 paths, no-regression to existing routes)

Frontend: new fragment template dashboard/templates/fragments/item_execution_report.html; new standalone page dashboard/templates/pages/project/item_execution_report.html; pure-CSS Gantt per the normative spec in the design doc; tab button addition in dashboard/templates/pages/project/item_detail.html
Code review: S07 (template conventions, CSS scoping, a11y, Gantt-spec compliance, visual correctness)

Tests: unit tests (assembly, markdown, retry hotspots, Gantt data, CLI, fix-summary ingestion); integration tests (auto-generation on completion hook, dashboard route renders); execute backfill of iw item-report for F-00055 + 2 priors on the live DB
Code review: S09 (test coverage vs AC, test isolation, no live-DB connections in unit tests, backfill correctness)
Final cross-agent review: database ↔ backend ↔ api ↔ frontend ↔ tests integration; AC coverage; no regressions to existing item-detail tabs
Fix CRITICAL and HIGH findings from S11

QV: Browser verification — F-00055 execution-report tab shows 3×/2×/2× hotspots, Gantt renders S13 retry segments, timeline accordion expands, standalone page deep-link works, no regressions to existing tabs
